title: [Bug]: The ZEROFILL attribute affects the results of queries.
poc:
create table t1 using the same table creation statement, but do not use the ZEROFILL modifier for the c0 column.
Query1 and Query2 result are consistent
```sql
mysql> -- Query1
mysql> SELECT /*+ NO_USE_COLUMN_TABLE(t0) */ true
    -> FROM t1
    -> WHERE HEX(concat(t1.c0, ''));
key_bug_features: ZEROFILL attribute alters query result consistency
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (c0 INT(100) ZEROFILL, c1 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, c2 DATE DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT c0, c1, HEX(concat(c0, '')) FROM t2 WHERE c0 IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE t3 (c0 INT(100), c1 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE);
